Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Can't believe the police station's sellin' weapons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What's more, they only gave us 5,000 yen! Ain't that kinda stingy? I mean, we're kinda savin' the world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I'm gonna miss the rerun of The Lonely Shogun! I gotta go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I'll leave the rest to you, Leader! Let's meet up again you-know-where![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Sweet. I'll leave the rest to you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I know I'm the one who brought you here, but you'll see me again you-know-where.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's a ton of shops and stuff in this place, so you really should check it out while you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are various facilities and stores throughout the city.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Stop by to find useful items to help with exploring Tartarus and meeting new Social Links.[n]{f 1 1}
